main.name: Shravani Roy
main.description: Senior Software Engineer architecting scalable cloud-native platforms. Proven expertise in Go, distributed systems, Kubernetes, and building high-impact platform solutions.
main.bio: I focus on high-impact platform engineering across distributed systems, API infrastructure, and developer tooling. Key outcomes include building an LLM-powered log analysis platform, implementing RBAC-based authorization for multi-tenant services, and improving API reliability through distributed caching and CI/CD automation.
main.contactmessage: Have a project idea or opportunity? Feel free to reach out by email or phone.

resume.skillmessage: Specialized expertise in platform engineering, cloud-native architecture, and high-performance distributed systems. Proficient across Go, Ruby on Rails, React, Kubernetes, and AWS with a track record of delivering measurable business impact.

education.description: Built a strong foundation in computer science fundamentals, software development practices, and collaborative project work.

work.title: Software Engineer → Associate Senior Software Engineer → Senior Software Engineer
work.description: Drove platform modernization and reliability improvements across the engineering org. 2022-2023: Built licensing and payment-wall infrastructure; designed cross-service PR automation reducing review cycles by 40%; led security hardening initiatives addressing 100+ CVEs. 2024-Present: Led LogGPT, an LLM-powered log analysis platform processing millions of logs; architected zero-downtime Go RBAC authorization service deployed at scale; optimized platform throughput +15-17 req/s via distributed KeyDB caching (80% success rate improvement); improved API reliability and reduced latency through systematic performance tuning.

work.title: Intern → Software Engineer
work.description: Built and shipped full-stack healthcare features impacting millions of users. Developed scalable Rails APIs and React+TypeScript frontends; established UI component library standardizing 50+ reusable components; established automated testing practices (RSpec, Jest, Selenium) improving code coverage from 45% to 85%; architected CI/CD pipelines enabling weekly releases and 99.9% uptime SLA.

projects.title: 2024-Present · Progress Chef
projects.category: Led LogGPT, built custom Go RBAC authorization, and delivered major performance gains through distributed caching.

projects.title: 2023 · Platform Reliability
projects.category: Improved deployment and operational reliability via CI/CD enhancements, cloud automation, and security hardening.

projects.title: 2022 · Platform Foundations
projects.category: Implemented licensing/payment-wall capabilities and automated cross-service integration workflows.

projects.title: 2019-2021 · Cerner
projects.category: Built and shipped full-stack features with Rails, React, and TypeScript; established test automation and release quality practices.

projects.title: Career Highlights
projects.category: End-to-end ownership across architecture, security, DevEx, and production performance in cloud-native platforms.

testimonials.text: Shravani brings deep technical expertise to every problem. She designs elegant solutions, mentors junior engineers, and consistently thinks about long-term maintainability while delivering on tight deadlines.
Exceptional platform engineer who takes ownership end-to-end. Her LogGPT implementation was a game-changer for our observability practices—delivered on schedule with zero production incidents.
Reliable collaborator with strong systems thinking. She identifies architectural improvements proactively and executes complex migrations with minimal risk.
